target_profile.intended_use: Internal exchange of a staged OHT/IUCLID-aligned JSON preview for review workflows.
notes: Unsupported fields and derived mappings remain review items rather than blockers for internal exchange.

action_items.title: Upgrade linked dossier readiness
action_items.summary: The linked version-pinned dossier does not satisfy the dossier-readiness profile required by the selected exchange gate.
recommended_steps: Review the linked dossier readiness assessment and its blocking or warning rules.
Resolve governance, disclaimer, fingerprint, or source-status issues on the version-pinned dossier.
Rerun both dossier readiness and interoperability readiness after the dossier is corrected.
action_items.trigger_message: Linked dossier readiness assessment requires human review before treating the preview as exchange-ready.

action_items.title: Review unsupported preview fields
action_items.summary: Unsupported local-only fields remain in the staged preview workflow and require review before relying on the current gate outcome.
recommended_steps: Inspect unsupported_field_paths in the readiness assessment.
Decide whether each field should remain MCP-internal or be added to a future preview profile revision.
Regenerate the preview or document the manual handling path.
action_items.trigger_message: Preview still carries unsupported local-only fields that require review or block the selected gate.

action_items.title: Replace non-direct mappings
action_items.summary: Derived or review-required mappings remain in the staged preview and block or downgrade the selected exchange gate.
recommended_steps: Inspect derived_mapping_paths and review_required_mapping_paths in the readiness assessment.
Replace provisional mappings with governed direct mappings where possible.
Reassess the preview after the mapping profile is hardened.
action_items.trigger_message: Preview still depends on derived or review-required mappings that require review or block the selected gate.

notes: Remediation bundle is derived from the interoperability readiness assessment and does not change the underlying dossier or preview.
Recommended actions are governed catalog entries keyed to triggered rule ids.
This bundle does not imply that all listed actions are sufficient for submission-capable XML generation.

decisions.rationale: Current adapter family remains explicitly internal-review only; waiver retained for controlled example exchange use.
Unsupported diagnostics were reviewed and retained in the MCP-only review bundle.
Derived mappings were accepted as governed preview-only mappings for this illustrative packet.

packet_note: Illustrative reviewer packet for governed interoperability remediation signoff.
